description: Two-tone leather shoes with a statement on its midfoot overlay - known for its subtle tones and hardy appeal, this woodland shoe Sports a 'Toughness Reloaded' statement on its upper, in a rare show of swank. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with cargos, chinos or washed denims and a checked casual shirt. Style this with a tonal belt.UpperTwo-tone leather upper with leather overlays Statement on a rubber overlay running through the midfoot to the heelCentral lace ups Outsole reinforced onto the upper on the heel region with brandingPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugsShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
